host.question: How do I list a car?
host.answer: You can list a car from your dashboard.

host.question: Can I edit my listing?
host.answer: Yes, go to your listings to edit them.

host.question: How do I delete a listing?
host.answer: Go to your listings and delete the one you want.

host.question: How many cars can I list?
host.answer: You can list an unlimited number of cars.

renter.question: How do I book a car?
renter.answer: Search for a car and click the book button.

renter.question: What should I do if I'm late?
renter.answer: Contact the host to inform them of the delay.

renter.question: How do I know if the car is available?
renter.answer: The car's availability is indicated on the listing page.

renter.question: What happens if the host cancels my booking?
renter.answer: We will offer you an alternative or a refund.

homePage.Location de voitures: Rent a Car, Join Us, and Drive with Freedom!
homePage.appDescription: Limitless is a car rental app. All our cars are carefully inspected. Easily rent a car using our map system and find one near you.
homePage.Location de voiture entre particuliers e: Peer-to-peer and professional car rentals insured by

carsBanner.Voitures Vérifiées-desc: All our vehicles are carefully inspected, as are your documents. Start your journey with peace of mind and create your account today.
carsBanner.Notre équipe est disponible à tout momen: Our team is available anytime to assist you, whether you face a breakdown or have questions.
carsBanner.Réservation Facile-desc: Book a car in just a few clicks with our fast and intuitive platform. It's simple and efficient.

homePage.Explorez une incroyable sélection de voi: Explore an amazing selection of cars, from the most common to the most extraordinary.
homePage.featuresTwo: Book a car near you. Find nearby cars and choose from the best models.
homePage.Trouvez des voitures autour de vous sur: Find Cars Around You on the Map
homePage.Visualisez les voitures disponibles auto: View available cars near you directly on the map.
homePage.Utilisez notre système de messagerie int: Use our integrated messaging system to easily communicate with car owners.
homePage.Donnez votre avis pour aider notre commu: Leave your feedback to help our community grow and improve.
homePage.Gérez vos documents comme votre permis d: Securely manage your documents, such as your driver's license and ID.
homePage.Nous avons travaillé avec des milliers d: We’ve worked with thousands of amazing people
homePage.“Un service rapide, pratique et fiable G: “A fast, convenient, and reliable service. Thanks to Limitless, I booked a car in just a few minutes.”
homePage.“J'ai réservé une voiture pour un week-e: “I rented a car for the weekend, and the service was exceptional. An easy-to-use interface and responsive customer support.”
homePage.“J'adore utiliser limitless! Le choix de: “I love using Limitless! The vehicle selection is vast, and everything is well-organized. I’ll never rent any other way.”
homePage.“Une expérience sans tracas ! Les véhicu: “A hassle-free experience! The vehicles are always clean and available. Limitless has completely changed how I travel.”
homePage.“Louer une voiture n'a jamais été aussi: “Renting a car has never been so simple and fast. Thank you, Limitless, for this quality service!”
homePage.“L'application est intuitive et l'assist: “The app is intuitive, and the customer support is great. If you need a car, Limitless is the perfect solution.”
homePage.Comment fonctionne le partage de voiture: How does car sharing work with Limitless?
homePage.limitless permet aux utilisateurs de lou: Limitless allows users to rent cars from others or rent out their own vehicles when not in use. Simply browse cars available in your area, book for the desired period, and pick up the car. The entire process is managed via our app.
homePage.Comment puis-je louer une voiture sur li: How can I rent a car on Limitless?
homePage.Pour louer une voiture, téléchargez simp: To rent a car, simply download the Limitless app, create an account, browse available cars near you, select the car you want, choose your rental period, and complete the booking. Payment is securely processed via the app.
homePage.Oui, tous les véhicules listés sur limit: Yes, all vehicles listed on limitless are covered by comprehensive insurance during the rental period. Our insurance covers damages, theft, and liability, providing you with peace of mind during your rental.
homePage.Quelles sont les conditions pour louer u: What are the conditions for renting a car?
homePage.Pour louer une voiture, vous devez avoir: To rent a car, you must be at least 21 years old, possess a valid driver's license, and meet the driver profile verification criteria of our platform. Some vehicles may have additional conditions based on the owner's preferences.
homePage.Comment rendre une voiture après la loca: How do I return a car after the rental?
homePage.Vous pouvez rendre la voiture à l'endroi: You can return the car at the location specified in your booking. The app will guide you through the return process, including vehicle inspection. If you encounter any issues during the return, you can contact our customer service via the app.
homePage.Que faire si j'ai un problème avec la vo: What should I do if I have an issue with the car during the rental?
homePage.Si vous rencontrez un problème avec la v: If you experience an issue with the car during the rental, you can report it directly through the app. Our support team will assist you, and depending on the nature of the issue, we may arrange for a replacement vehicle or provide a solution.
homePage.Puis-je louer ma propre voiture via limi: Can I rent out my own car through limitless?
homePage.Oui ! Si vous possédez une voiture, vous: Yes! If you own a car, you can list it on the limitless platform and earn money by renting it out. Simply sign up as a vehicle owner, upload your car's details and availability, and our app will handle the bookings.
homePage.Que se passe-t-il si je rends la voiture: What happens if I return the car late?
homePage.Les retards de retour sont soumis à des: Late returns are subject to additional charges based on the hourly or daily rental rate. To avoid these fees, make sure to return the car on time. If you anticipate a delay, please inform the vehicle owner through the app.
homePage.Puis-je prolonger ma période de location: Can I extend my rental period?
homePage.Oui, vous pouvez prolonger votre période: Yes, you can extend your rental period directly through the app as long as the car is available for the new dates. You can request an extension, and if the vehicle owner agrees, your booking will be updated.
homePage.Comment contacter le service client ?: How do I contact customer service?
homePage.Si vous avez besoin d'assistance, vous p: If you need assistance, you can contact our customer support team via the app. Simply go to the 'Help' section and submit your request; a representative will respond promptly.

contact.title: Contact our insurance support team
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we will route your request to the right team for policy questions, coverage options, quotes, claims, billing, certificates, renewals, cancellations, employee benefits, risk management, personal insurance, commercial insurance, and rental-related protection.
contact.fastestHelpTitle: How to get the fastest help
contact.fastestHelpText: Choose the category that best matches your request and include the identifiers our team needs to review it without delay.
fastestHelpItems: For claims or accidents, include the reservation, policy or claim number, date, location, photos, and any police or third-party information.
For billing, renewals, cancellations, or policy changes, include the policy number, invoice, renewal notice, or payment reference.
For commercial insurance, employee benefits, certificates, or risk management, include company name, fleet size, locations, and deadline.

departmentCards.title: Claims and incidents
departmentCards.text: Accidents, vehicle damage, theft, liability questions, claim status, and supporting documents.

departmentCards.title: Policy service
departmentCards.text: Coverage questions, policy changes, renewals, cancellations, certificates, and billing support.

departmentCards.title: Commercial and benefits
departmentCards.text: Fleet insurance, agency partnerships, risk management, life and health questions, and employee benefits.

contact.formIntro: The more context you provide, the easier it is for the appropriate department to respond accurately.
contact.policyOrReservation: Policy, reservation, invoice, or certificate number (optional)
contact.category: What do you need help with?
contact.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the situation, what happened, what you need, important dates, vehicle or policy details, and any deadlines.
contact.consent: I agree that Limitless may use the information in this request to route and respond to my support inquiry.
contact.responseTime: Most requests receive a response within 1 to 2 business days. Urgent claim and safety issues are prioritized.
contact.successMessage: Your request has been received. The appropriate team will review it and respond as soon as possible.
contact.errorMessage: We could not send your request. Please try again or contact us again later.

validation.details: Please add at least 20 characters so our team has enough context.
validation.consent: Please confirm that we may use your request details to respond.

guidance: Ask about policy terms, documents, eligibility, exclusions, deductibles, or what a policy means for your situation.
Compare coverage options, limits, add-ons, deductibles, and protection choices before booking or changing a policy.
Request a quote for personal, commercial, fleet, life, health, benefits, or car-sharing protection.
Get help opening a claim, checking claim status, submitting documents, or understanding next steps after an incident.
Ask about invoices, receipts, failed payments, refunds, payment methods, or billing corrections.
Request address, driver, vehicle, coverage, beneficiary, company, or contact detail changes.
Ask about renewal notices, renewal pricing, required documents, or upcoming expiration dates.
Request cancellation help, cancellation timing, proof of cancellation, or what happens after cancellation.
Request proof of insurance, certificate holders, additional insured wording, or commercial certificate updates.
Ask questions about life, health, medical, disability, or related protection options.
Get guidance for personal auto, home, liability, travel, or individual coverage needs.
Get help with business auto, fleet, liability, property, agency, or commercial coverage needs.
Ask about group health, life, disability, voluntary benefits, enrollment, or plan administration.
Request risk reviews, loss control guidance, safety practices, claims trend support, or fleet risk advice.
Report accidents, damage, theft, late return issues, liability concerns, or urgent rental protection questions.
Get help with app access, account verification, booking issues, or reservation support.
Discuss professional fleet publishing, agency partnerships, onboarding, and commercial requirements.
Tell us what you need and we will route your request to the right insurance or support team.

guidanceSections.title: Information to include
items: Your policy, reservation, claim, invoice, or certificate number when available.
Dates, locations, vehicle details, driver or company name, and a clear description of what happened.
Photos, police reports, invoices, renewal notices, or certificate wording if they are relevant.

guidanceSections.title: Best department for your request
items: Use Claims for accidents, damage, theft, liability events, and claim status.
Use Policy Service for coverage documents, changes, cancellations, renewals, billing, and certificates.
Use Commercial, Benefits, or Risk Management for fleets, companies, employee benefits, loss control, and agency requests.

guidanceSections.title: Urgent situations
items: If anyone is in danger, contact local emergency services first.
For an active rental incident, make the vehicle safe, document the scene, and submit the request as urgent.
For deadlines such as certificates, renewals, or cancellations, include the required date in your message.

newPage.main-desc: With limitless, rent out your car and turn it into an additional source of income. Earn your salary easily by sharing your vehicle. limitless is the perfect solution to make your car profitable with ease.
newPage.Verifer vos documents et commencez à gag: Verify your documents and start earning money
newPage.Louez votre voiture et transformez votre: Rent your car and transform the way you earn money
newPage.De plus en plus d'hôtes trouvent une vér: More and more hosts find true satisfaction in renting out their car and generating passive income. It's a simple and secure way to increase your income, without daily effort.
newPage.Rejoignez des milliers d'hôtes qui parta: Join thousands of hosts who share their vehicle to generate extra income in a flexible and profitable way.
newPage.Découvrez la satisfaction de recevoir de: Experience the satisfaction of receiving regular payments by renting out your car during your unused time.
newPage.Maximisez vos revenus en mettant votre v: Maximize your income by making your vehicle available to others while staying in control of your schedule.
newPage.Profitez d'une plateforme intuitive qui: Enjoy an intuitive platform that allows you to easily manage the rental of your car while staying flexible with your availability.

hostIncentives.Proposez votre voiture sur notre platefo: List your car on our platform and easily generate additional income.
hostIncentives.Vous avez le contrôle total sur la dispo: You have full control over the availability, rates, and rental conditions of your vehicle.
hostIncentives.Votre véhicule est protégé par une assur: Your vehicle is protected by comprehensive insurance during each rental, for complete peace of mind.

newPage.Ajoutez, modifiez ou supprimez vos annon: Add, edit, or delete your listings to better manage your rentals.
newPage.Consultez et gérez vos réservations avec: View and manage your bookings with a simple and intuitive dashboard.
newPage.Utilisez notre système de messagerie pou: Use our messaging system to stay in touch with your clients.
newPage.Collectez des retours pour améliorer vos: Collect feedback to improve your services and attract more clients.
newPage.Téléchargez et organisez vos documents i: Download and organize your important documents securely.

posts.app_ready_message: This app is ready for testing and almost ready for the Apple Store and App Store. We are currently translating, changing animations, and adding more features. This version is for you to test as a beta, but we are still implementing more features.
posts.alert_message: We are building the largest car rental platform
posts.ge: get the app in play store or app store
posts.launchInFrance: We’ve launched in France for everyone!
posts.excitedToHelp: We are excited to help you make money.
posts.learnToGrow: Explore how technology is reshaping the automotive industry.
posts.boostConversionDescription: Discover the latest advancements in self-driving technology, including AI-driven decision-making, sensor fusion, and real-world safety enhancements.
posts.buildBrandOnlineDescription: Learn how breakthroughs in battery technology, charging infrastructure, and sustainable manufacturing are driving the EV revolution.
posts.futureDigitalMarketingDescription: Understand how connected car technology and IoT are transforming mobility, enhancing safety, and improving user experience.
posts.aiDrivenVehiclesDescription: Explore how artificial intelligence is streamlining car design, enabling predictive maintenance, and enhancing manufacturing efficiency.
posts.futureEnergyDescription: Dive into the potential of hydrogen fuel cells as a clean energy source and their role in shaping the future of zero-emission vehicles.
posts.virtualExperienceDescription: Learn how virtual and augmented reality are revolutionizing the way we design, sell, and experience cars.

professionalsPage.title: Professionals & Agencies
professionalsPage.intro: Limitless welcomes car rental companies such as Hertz, Europcar, local agencies, and other fleet operators that want to publish vehicles on our platform. The product was built first for peer-to-peer car sharing, connecting individuals who want to rent out their vehicles with people looking for a car.

visual.title: Fleet-ready publishing
visual.first: Publish eligible vehicles with clear availability and booking details.
visual.second: Contact us directly to discuss partnership opportunities.

stats.label: Our core mission remains helping individual owners share their cars and earn income.
Rental companies and operators can talk to us about adding professional inventory.
Partnership requests are handled directly so we can understand your fleet and market.

sections.title: Built for individuals first
sections.text: Limitless was created to make car sharing accessible to everyday vehicle owners and nearby renters. That peer-to-peer model remains the foundation of the platform.

sections.title: Open to professional supply
sections.text: Companies such as Hertz, Europcar, independent agencies, and specialized fleet operators can explore publishing vehicles where it improves choice for renters.

sections.title: More income from vehicles
sections.text: We will keep investing in tools that help people and organizations turn unused vehicle time into revenue while keeping the experience simple.

details.title: For fleet operators
items: Discuss vehicle eligibility, locations, and operating requirements.
Publish vehicles with clear photos, pricing, and availability.
Coordinate with our team on onboarding and partnership expectations.

details.title: For the community
items: Individuals remain central to the marketplace.
Professional inventory can add availability in busy areas.
Renters get more choice while still using one simple platform.

details.title: Partnership focus
items: We review partnership requests directly.
We look for reliable operators and transparent vehicle information.
We prioritize a useful experience for renters, hosts, and fleet partners.

professionalsPage.stepsIntro: Interested companies can contact us first, then we review the right onboarding path together.

steps.title: Introduce your fleet
steps.text: Tell us about your company, operating locations, vehicle types, and expected volume.

steps.title: Review the fit
steps.text: We discuss how your inventory can work alongside the peer-to-peer marketplace.

steps.title: Prepare publishing
steps.text: If there is a fit, we coordinate listing details, verification, and support expectations.

professionalsPage.contactText: Contact us directly and our team will review your professional fleet or agency request.

insurancePage.title: Insurance
insurancePage.intro: Insurance has its own dedicated space on Limitless. Eligible bookings include protection information designed to help hosts and renters understand coverage, verification, incident support, and claims guidance.

visual.title: Protection details
visual.first: Review coverage information inside the reservation flow.
visual.second: Contact support quickly if an incident happens during a rental.

stats.label: Protection information is presented for eligible reservations according to the applicable terms.
Documents and vehicle details help keep the marketplace safer before rentals begin.
Our team can guide hosts and renters through incident reporting and next steps.

sections.title: Protection during rentals
sections.text: Coverage can help protect eligible rentals from covered damage, theft, and liability events according to the terms that apply to the reservation.

sections.title: Clear information before booking
sections.text: Renters and hosts should review insurance details in the booking flow so they understand what is included, what may be excluded, and what actions are required.

sections.title: Help when something happens
sections.text: If there is an accident, damage, theft, or another issue, users should contact support quickly and follow the instructions provided for the reservation.

details.title: For hosts
items: Keep vehicle information accurate and current.
Follow the verification and handover process for each booking.
Report incidents quickly with photos, documents, and relevant details.

details.title: For renters
items: Review the protection details before confirming a booking.
Respect the rental rules, eligible driver requirements, and vehicle return process.
Contact support immediately after an incident or suspected theft.

details.title: Important details
items: Coverage may depend on the country, vehicle, driver eligibility, and reservation terms.
Some exclusions, deductibles, or documentation requirements may apply.
The reservation terms and support instructions should be treated as the source of truth.

insurancePage.stepsIntro: Act quickly and keep the information complete so support can help with the next steps.

steps.title: Secure everyone first
steps.text: Prioritize safety, contact emergency services if needed, and do not continue driving an unsafe vehicle.

steps.title: Document the situation
steps.text: Take photos, collect relevant details, and keep any police report or third-party information.

steps.title: Contact support
steps.text: Report the issue through the app or contact page so the team can guide the claim or resolution process.

insurancePage.contactText: Contact us if you need help understanding coverage or reporting an incident linked to a reservation.
